title: elaeagnus igda
intro: Elaeagnus igda, also known as Elaeagnus multiflora or Elaeagnus parvifolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeagnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elaeagnus igda include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Elaeagnus igda can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
